_purpose: M8-B1 floor-invariant golden fixture (task_89c4, CTO binding edit #3 in docs/design/cto-decision-brief.md). This is the EXACT `docker run` argv Magpie's hardened 'crun floor' tier ships today, as returned by reviewer.ts's buildReviewDockerArgs(). reviewer-crun-floor-argv.test.ts asserts the built argv equals `argv` below byte-for-byte (order included). If this test fails, either your change introduced an unintentional flag drift (fix the code), or you deliberately changed the hardened posture (update `argv` below IN THE SAME PR so the diff is visible in review, per the task's whole point).
_normalizedInputs: argv below was built from FIXED, non-production placeholder values for every per-job/per-host variable (container name, uid:gid, /work, /out, /run/gw host paths) — see reviewer-crun-floor-argv.test.ts's `GOLDEN_INPUT` constant for the exact values fed into the pure builder. Only the security-relevant FLAG SET, flag ORDER, and the deployment-wide (non-per-job) config values (image, memory/cpu/pids caps, gateway base URL, model) are meaningful here.
